transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_ERP_POS_SOLD_TO_KEY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY from N_GL_REV_MEASURE into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE_TA  GL,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE GL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_ERP_POS_SOLD_TO_KEY_TA1
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY between INV and Keys table from N_INV_REV_MEASURE into the Interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE_TA  INV,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE INV.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_ERP_POS_SOLD_TO_KEY_TA  WI_KEY WHERE INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=WI_KEY.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the data into the table having transactions in GL and INV

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
WI.CUSTOMER_TYPE,
WI.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
WI.ERP_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUM,
WI.ERP_BK_LOCATION_ID_INT, 
WI.ERP_BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
WI.ERP_WIPS_SITE_USE_ID_INT, 
WI.ERP_PARTY_NUM,
WI.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME, 
WI.ERP_PARTY_SITE_ID_INT,
WI.ERP_PARTY_SITE_NUM, 
WI.ERP_PARTY_ID_INT,
WI.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_ID, 
WI.ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_DESCR,
WI.ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
WI.ERP_BUSINESS_ENTITY_CD,
WI.ERP_INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLG, 
WI.ERP_CUSTOMER_CLASS_CD,
WI.ERP_CUSTOMER_CLASS_DESCR, 
WI.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
WI.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLG, 
WI.ERP_CUSTOMER_ACCT_STATUS_CD,
WI.ERP_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_LOCATOR_KEY,
WI.WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE_ACTIVE_FLG, 
WI.WIPS_THEATER_NAME,
WI.ERP_WIPS_ADDRESS_ID_INT, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_LINE_1_ADDR,
WI.ERP_WIPS_LINE_2_ADDR, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_LINE_3_ADDR,
WI.ERP_WIPS_LINE_4_ADDR, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_CITY_NAME,
WI.STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME,
 WI.ERP_WIPS_COUNTY_NAME,
WI.ERP_WIPS_POSTAL_CD, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_POSTAL_PLUS4_CD,
WI.ERP_WIPS_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_ADDRESS_STATUS_CD,
WI.ERP_WIPS_COMPLETENESS_FLG, 
WI.ERP_WIPS_GEO_VALIDITY_CODE,
WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WI.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
FROM	
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO_TA_WD0 WI,$$STGDB.WI_ERP_POS_SOLD_TO_KEY_TA  WI_KEY
WHERE WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=WI_KEY.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
